# CWE-360 safe — Trust of System Event Data (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-360-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type GormDB struct{}

func (db *GormDB) Exec(query string, args ...interface{}) error { return nil }

func BanClientIP(c *GinCtx, db *GormDB) error {
	host, _, err := net.SplitHostPort(c.Request.RemoteAddr)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	clientIP := strings.Trim(host, "[]")
	return db.Exec("INSERT INTO ip_bans (ip) VALUES (?)", clientIP)
}
